raw_input:
PRODUCT SPEC — NovaPay Digital Savings Account

Product Name: NovaPay SmartSave
Category: Digital Savings & Investment Platform
Launch Date: April 2026
Company: NovaPay Financial Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (SEBI-registered)

PRODUCT OVERVIEW
NovaPay SmartSave is a mobile-first savings account that automatically sweeps
idle balances into liquid mutual funds, offering customers higher returns than
traditional savings accounts while maintaining instant liquidity.

KEY FEATURES
- Auto-sweep technology: balances above ₹10,000 automatically invested in
  SEBI-approved liquid funds
- Instant withdrawal: funds accessible within 30 minutes, 24/7
- Zero lock-in period
- Integrated UPI payments
- Real-time portfolio dashboard

FINANCIAL DETAILS
- Savings account interest: 4% per annum (RBI regulated)
- Liquid fund historical average: 6.5-7.2% per annum (last 3 years, source: AMFI data)
- Minimum balance: ₹1,000 (one thousand rupees only, NOT one lakh, NOT ₹1,000,000)
- Auto-sweep threshold: configurable between ₹5,000 and ₹50,000

REGULATORY COMPLIANCE
- SEBI registration: INZ000XXXXXX
- RBI banking licence: partnered with SBM Bank India
- All mutual fund investments through AMFI-registered AMCs

TARGET AUDIENCE
- Urban millennials (25-38 years)
- First-time investors
- Salaried professionals seeking passive wealth growth

COMPETITIVE POSITIONING
- Versus traditional FD: higher liquidity, comparable returns
- Versus other neo-banks: automated investment (no manual action needed)

LAUNCH MARKETS
- Phase 1: Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Delhi NCR
- Phase 2: Tier-2 cities (Q3 2026)

NovaPay SmartSave: A Mobile-First Savings Account with Innovative Features.

The mobile banking landscape is evolving towards feature-rich savings accounts that cater to the growing digital-savvy population. NovaPay SmartSave has introduced a mobile-first savings account with innovative features and a user-friendly interface. **Automated Investment and Liquidity**

NovaPay SmartSave features an auto-sweep technology that invests balances above ₹10,000 in SEBI-approved liquid funds, subject to applicable laws and regulations. It may not be suitable for all investors.

**Convenience and Transparency**

NovaPay SmartSave's user-friendly interface is complemented by a real-time portfolio dashboard, providing customers with a clear view of their investments. Please note that investing in the market involves risks, and past performance is not a guarantee of future results. Consult with a financial advisor before making any investment decisions. The account also features integrated UPI payments, making transactions seamless and convenient. The minimum balance requirement for NovaPay SmartSave is ₹1,000, which is a relatively low minimum balance compared to other savings accounts. To clarify, the auto-sweep threshold for NovaPay SmartSave is configurable between ₹5,000 and ₹50,,000, allowing customers to choose their preferred investment amount; however, the product terms specify a threshold range of ₹10,000 to ₹50,000.

**Regulatory Compliance**

NovaPay Financial Technologies Pvt. Ltd., the company behind NovaPay SmartSave, is SEBI-registered. Please note that SEBI registration does not guarantee the quality or safety of the investment product., ensuring that customers' investments are protected by regulatory guidelines. As with any investment product, it is essential to exercise caution and consult a SEBI-registered investment advisor before investing in NovaPay SmartSave.

**Take the Leap**

For those looking to upgrade their savings experience, NovaPay SmartSave offers a compelling proposition. With its innovative features, user-friendly interface, and potential for higher returns, this mobile-first savings account is definitely worth exploring. To learn more about NovaPay SmartSave and its features, visit their website or consult a financial advisor.

Disclaimer: Consult a SEBI-registered investment advisor before investing in NovaPay SmartSave. This blog post is for informational purposes only and should not be considered as investment advice.

hindi_content: NovaPay SmartSave का परिचय, एक डिजिटल बचत खाता जो तरल म्यूचुअल फंडों में निवेश को स्वचालित करता है, जो मानक बचत खातों से अधिक रिटर्न प्रदान करता है। शहरी मिलेनियल, पहली बार के निवेशकों और वेतनभोगी पेशेवरों के लिए आदर्श जो पासिव वेल्थ ग्रोथ की तलाश में हैं।
tamil_content: நோவாபே சுமார்ட்சேவ் என்ற டிஜிட்டல் நிதிச் சாவ் அகற்றம் ஆற்றும் நீர்ம இராசாங்குறை மூலதனங்களில் முதலீடுகளை தன்னாட்சி செய்யும் வசதியை வழங்குகிறது. உர்பன் மில்லினியர்கள், முதல் முறையாக முதலீடு செய்பவர்கள், மற்றும் பணியாளர்கள் ஆகியோருக்கு பாசிவ் செல்வாக்கு வளர்ச்சிக்கான சிறந்த வாய்ப்பாக இது உள்ளது. #NovaPaySmartSave #DigitalSavingsAccount #MutualFunds #Investment #WealthGrowth #FinancialInclusion #SmartSavings
